hero.title:
The Mediterranean
Horizon
hero.subtitle: Experience excellence on the French Riviera. Breathtaking sea views, outstanding gastronomy and the Provençal art de vivre in the heart of Èze-sur-Mer.

about.title: The Art of Mediterranean Hospitality
about.description: Since 1923, the Hôtel Belvédère has embodied the French art of living on the Côte d'Azur. Perched above the turquoise waters of the Mediterranean, our 48-room property blends the charm of Belle Époque architecture with the refinement of contemporary luxury.
about.description2: Every detail — from the Carrara marble in our bathrooms to the art collections curated by our specialists — reflects our unwavering commitment to excellence and Provençal authenticity.

rooms.title: Rooms & Suites
rooms.subtitle: Each room is an invitation to travel, where Provençal elegance meets exceptional comfort with views over the Mediterranean.
rooms.suiteDesc: Our most exclusive suite offers a 180° panoramic view of the Mediterranean, a private terrace and an outdoor jacuzzi.
rooms.deluxeDesc: Elegant room with balcony and direct sea view, decorated in a refined contemporary Provençal style.
rooms.classiqueDesc: The charm of the Belle Époque in an intimate and comfortable setting, with all the amenities for a perfect stay.

restaurant.title: La Terrasse du Belvédère
restaurant.subtitle: Exceptional Mediterranean cuisine with breathtaking views over the French Riviera
restaurant.description: Under the direction of Chef Éric Morel, La Terrasse celebrates the authentic flavours of the Mediterranean. Local produce, elevated classic techniques, and a wine list carefully selected by our sommelier — every meal is a unique sensory experience.
restaurant.wineDesc: Over 400 references carefully selected by our sommelier

spa.title: Spa & Serenity
spa.subtitle: Treat yourself to a haven of pure serenity in the heart of the French Riviera
spa.description: Our 800m² spa offers a comprehensive range of treatments inspired by Mediterranean traditions. Heated indoor pool, hammam, sauna, fitness room — let yourself be carried by the serenity of the sea.

massage-signature.name: Belvédère Signature Massage
massage-signature.description: Our exclusive massage combining Swedish and Mediterranean techniques for deep relaxation

soin-visage.name: Luminosity Facial
soin-visage.description: Anti-ageing protocol with marine actives, intense hydration and immediate radiance guaranteed

hammam-gommage.name: Hammam & Scrub Ritual
hammam-gommage.description: Complete purification with beldi soap, kessa scrub and white clay wrap

rituel-mediterraneen.name: Grand Mediterranean Ritual
rituel-mediterraneen.description: The ultimate experience: floral bath, four-hand massage, facial and tea ceremony

gallery.title: Belvédère Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Let yourself be seduced by the beauty of our property and the splendour of the French Riviera

location.title: In the Heart of the French Riviera
location.address: 12 Avenue de la Mer, Èze-sur-Mer, 06360 Alpes-Maritimes
location.bycar: By car: 15 min from Nice, 30 min from Monaco
location.bytrain: By train: Èze-sur-Mer station 2 km away
location.byplane: By plane: Nice Côte d'Azur Airport 20 km away

cta.title: Your Exceptional Stay Begins Here
cta.subtitle: Book directly on our website and enjoy our best guaranteed rates, personalised welcome and exclusive benefits.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Our team is at your disposal to make your stay unforgettable
contact.name: Full name

notFound.subtitle: This page got lost somewhere on the Mediterranean…
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

footer.description: 5-star luxury hotel established since 1923 on the French Riviera. 48 rooms and suites with sea views, gourmet restaurant, spa and infinity pool.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Hôtel Belvédère · Èze-sur-Mer · All rights reserved

home.title: Hôtel Belvédère — Luxury & Charm on the French Riviera
home.description: Experience exceptional hospitality on the French Riviera. Sea views, Mediterranean gastronomy, spa & pool. 5-star hotel since 1923.

chambres.title: Rooms & Suites
chambres.description: Discover our 48 rooms and suites with views over the Mediterranean. From Provençal charm to the excellence of contemporary luxury.

restaurant.title: La Terrasse — Gourmet Restaurant
restaurant.description: Savour exceptional Mediterranean cuisine with breathtaking views over the French Riviera. Chef Éric Morel, local produce, selected wines.

spa.title: Spa & Wellness
spa.description: Our 800m² spa invites you to a haven of serenity. Massages, facials, hammam, heated indoor pool.

galerie.title: Photo Gallery
galerie.description: Discover in pictures the beauty of the Hôtel Belvédère, its rooms, La Terrasse restaurant, spa and views over the Mediterranean.

contact.title: Contact & Reservations
contact.description: Contact the Hôtel Belvédère to book your stay or get information. Our team is at your disposal 24/7.
